title: Cast generator population validation
rationale: Validates that the v0.1 cast generator produces a believable office population per the cast bible.

deliverables.description: Per-NPC validation report: drive ranges, personality ranges, inhibition counts, relationship sketch counts.

acceptanceTests.assertion: All NPCs have drive baselines within archetype-expected ranges (elevated 55-75, depressed 25-45, neutral 40-60).
Seeded relationships include at least 2 rivalries, 1 old flame, 1 mentor pair.
Each NPC's inhibitions match its archetype's starter set count and classes.

nonGoals: Do not modify any source files.
Do not generate dialog corpus content.
